title: Love Letteru Ezhutha Lyrics Kanna Laddu Thinna Aasaiya
stanzas: <div>Love Letter'u Ezhutha Lyrics Kanna Laddu Thinna Aasaiya

love letter'u ezhutha aasa patten
innum ezhuthala
atha unnidam kodukka aasapatten
kodukka mudiyala
gaana kathukka vandhen
naanu unga veetula
petrol illatha car'raattam
ninnen roattula

love letter'u ezhutha aasa patten
innum ezhuthala
atha unnidam kodukka aasapatten
kodukka mudiyala

un chithi torchure'ra naa thaangi
un chitappan kitta adi vaangi
love pannen unnadhan

un thambi vanthan emanaattam
dhinamum ennaku poraatam
kizhinju pochu en bel bottom

thorathi thorathi kaathalichen
veri pudicha naayaattam
egiri kuthichu odariye
vandalur'ru maanaatam
naa appa takkaru
intha vaangiko letter'ru

anna nada podaathe
enna aati padaikaathe
en wife'fa vanthidu
aasaiya moodi maraikathe

un appan pecha mathikathe
i love you sollidu
velambaratha paathuvittu
veezhthidatha aathukulla
nadanam aadi kaattiduvaan
maatikaatha sethukulla

avan china made'du maa
ivan pakka fraud'du maa (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Love Letteru Ezhutha?

The song humorously explores the theme of writing a love letter and the playful challenges that come with it.

Who are the singers of this song?

Gaana Bala and Mukesh lend their voices to this energetic track.

Who composed the music for Kanna Laddu Thinna Aasaiya?

The music was composed by Thaman S, known for his catchy and upbeat compositions.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is set in a comedic scenario where the protagonist attempts to express his love through a letter.

When was the movie Kanna Laddu Thinna Aasaiya released?

The movie was released on January 11, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Love Letteru Ezhutha from Kanna Laddu Thinna Aasaiya is a playful and humorous take on the challenges of expressing love through a letter. Sung by Gaana Bala and Mukesh, the track is infused with catchy beats by Thaman S, making it an instant favorite for its light-hearted and romantic vibe. The lyrics, penned by Gaana Bala, add a comedic touch to the romantic pursuit depicted in the movie. This song captures the essence of youthful love and the fun associated with it, making it perfect for celebrations and parties.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Love Letteru Ezhutha from the comedy hit Kanna Laddu Thinna Aasaiya. With Gaana Bala's unique lyrical style and Thaman S's catchy beats, this song is a delightful blend of humor and romance. Dive into this peppy track that captures the essence of youthful love and fun.
stanzaMeanings: I wanted to write a love letter but haven't yet. I wanted to give it to you but couldn't. I came to learn songs at your house, like a car without petrol stopped on the road.
I wanted to write a love letter but haven't yet. I wanted to give it to you but couldn't.
Your aunt is torturing me, and I got beaten by your uncle. I loved only you.
Your brother came and caused trouble. Every day is a struggle for me, and my bell-bottoms are torn.
I chased and chased, fell in love. Like a wild hunt, I jumped and ran. Like a deer in Vandalur, I am here. Take this letter.
Brother, don't walk like that. Don't make me dance. I want to bring my wife, don't hide your feelings.
Don't respect your father's words. Say 'I love you' and don't fall for the announcement. He will dance at home, don't get caught.
He's a small-time cheat, he's a complete fraud.
